name: Energy Resources of Australia Ltd
description: Energy Resources of Australia Ltd (ERA) is one of Australia's longest-running uranium producers, having historically operated the Ranger Uranium Mine in the Northern Territory. Following the cessation of mining and processing operations, ERA's primary focus has transitioned to the comprehensive environmental rehabilitation of the Ranger Project Area. The company is majority-owned by Rio Tinto and is committed to returning the land to a state where it can be incorporated into the surrounding Kakadu National Park.
